spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(i.code, 'ID: ' || i.id) || ' (' || COALESCE(last_status.name, 'Без статуса') || ')' AS "Инцидент",
  to_char(
    i.incident_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow',
    'DD.MM.YYYY HH24:MI'
  ) AS "Зарегестрирован",
  p.pole AS "Опора",
  COALESCE(b.bs_name, 'Отсутствует') AS "Базовая станция",
  COALESCE(it.name, 'Отсутствует') AS "Тип инцидента",
  COALESCE(ist.name, 'Отсутствует') AS "Подтип инцидента",
  -- Расчет времени начала АВР (для информации)
  CASE
    WHEN i.avr_start_date IS NULL THEN 'Отсутствует'
    ELSE to_char(
      i.avr_start_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow',
      'DD.MM.YYYY HH24:MI'
    )
  END AS "Начало АВР",
  -- Расчет времени окончания АВР (если есть)
  CASE
    WHEN i.avr_end_date IS NULL THEN 'Отсутствует'
    ELSE to_char(
      i.avr_end_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow',
      'DD.MM.YYYY HH24:MI'
    )
  END AS "Конец АВР",
  CASE
    WHEN (
      it.sla_deadline IS NULL
      or i.avr_start_date IS NULL
    ) THEN 'Отсутсвтует'
    ELSE to_char(
      (
        i.avr_start_date + (it.sla_deadline || ' minutes') :: interval
      ) AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow',
      'DD.MM.YYYY HH24:MI'
    )
  END AS "Дедлайн АВР",
  CASE
    -- 1. Нет SLA или нет старта работы
    WHEN (
      it.sla_deadline IS NULL
      OR i.avr_start_date IS NULL
    ) THEN 'EMPTY' -- 2. Инцидент закрыт вовремя
    WHEN i.avr_end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND i.avr_end_date <= (
      i.avr_start_date + (it.sla_deadline || ' minutes') :: interval
    ) THEN 'CLOSED' -- 3. Инцидент закрыт с опозданием
    WHEN i.avr_end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND i.avr_end_date > (
      i.avr_start_date + (it.sla_deadline || ' minutes') :: interval
    ) THEN 'CRITICAL' -- 4. Инцидент еще открыт
    ELSE CASE
      -- Дедлайн прошел
      WHEN EXTRACT(
        EPOCH
        FROM
          (
            (
              i.avr_start_date + (it.sla_deadline || ' minutes') :: interval
            ) - NOW()
          )
      ) < 0 THEN 'ERROR' -- Осталось <= 1 часа
      WHEN EXTRACT(
        EPOCH
        FROM
          (
            (
              i.avr_start_date + (it.sla_deadline || ' minutes') :: interval
            ) - NOW()
          )
      ) <= 3600 THEN 'WARNING' -- Осталось > 1 часа
      ELSE 'NORMAL'
    END
  END as "Статус SLA",
  COALESCE(p.address, 'Без адреса') AS "Адрес",
  p.pole_latitude AS latitude,
  p.pole_longtitude AS longitude,
  i.id AS incident_id,
  p.site_id AS pole_site_id
FROM
  incidents_incident AS i
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
      DISTINCT ON (sh.incident_id) sh.incident_id,
      s.name
    FROM
      incidents_incidentstatushistory sh
      JOIN incidents_incidentstatus s ON sh.status_id = s.id
    ORDER BY
      sh.incident_id,
      sh.insert_date DESC,
      sh.id DESC
  ) AS last_status ON i.id = last_status.incident_id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidenttype AS it ON i.incident_type_id = it.id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentsubtype AS ist ON i.incident_subtype_id = ist.id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentcategoryrelation AS icr ON i.id = icr.incident_id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentcategory AS ic ON icr.category_id = ic.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_pole AS p ON i.pole_id = p.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_region AS r ON p.region_id = r.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_macroregion AS m ON r.macroregion_id = m.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestation AS b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator AS bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator AS op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id
WHERE
  ic.name = 'АВР'
  AND ic.id IN ($categories)
  AND is_incident_finish = False
  AND p.pole_latitude IS NOT NULL
  AND p.pole_longtitude IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(i.incident_date)
  AND (
    $macroregion = 0
    OR m.id IN ($macroregion)
  )
  AND (
    $avr_contractor = 0
    OR p.avr_contractor_id IN ($avr_contractor)
  )
  AND (
    '${region_manager}' = '0'
    OR r.responsible_manager = '${region_manager}'
  )
  AND (
    '${operator_group}' = '0'
    OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}'
  )
  AND (
      ( '${min_incident_ttl}' = '0' OR 
        (CASE WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) END) >= ${min_incident_ttl} )
  )
  AND (
      ( '${max_incident_ttl}' = '0' OR 
        (CASE WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) END) <= ${max_incident_ttl} )
  )
  AND (
    (
      -1 IN ($incident_type)
      AND (
        incident_type_id IS NULL
        OR incident_type_id IN ($incident_type)
      )
    )
    OR 0 IN ($incident_type)
    OR incident_type_id IN ($incident_type)
  )
  AND (
    (
      -1 IN ($incident_subtype)
      AND (
        incident_subtype_id IS NULL
        OR incident_subtype_id IN ($incident_subtype)
      )
    )
    OR 0 IN ($incident_subtype)
    OR incident_subtype_id IN ($incident_subtype)
  )
GROUP BY
  i.id,
  i.code,
  last_status.name,
  i.incident_date,
  p.pole,
  b.bs_name,
  it.name,
  ist.name,
  p.address,
  p.pole_latitude,
  p.pole_longtitude,
  p.site_id,
  it.sla_deadline,
  i.avr_start_date,
  i.avr_end_date

SELECT
  COALESCE(i.code, 'ID: ' || i.id) || ' (' || COALESCE(last_status.name, 'Без статуса') || ')' AS "Инцидент",
  to_char(
    i.incident_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow',
    'DD.MM.YYYY HH24:MI'
  ) AS "Зарегестрирован",
  p.pole AS "Опора",
  COALESCE(b.bs_name, 'Отсутствует') AS "Базовая станция",
  COALESCE(it.name, 'Отсутствует') AS "Тип инцидента",
  COALESCE(ist.name, 'Отсутствует') AS "Подтип инцидента",
  
  -- Расчет времени начала РВР (для информации)
  CASE
    WHEN i.rvr_start_date IS NULL THEN 'Отсутствует'
    ELSE to_char(
      i.rvr_start_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow',
      'DD.MM.YYYY HH24:MI'
    )
  END AS "Начало РВР",
  
  -- Расчет времени окончания РВР (если есть)
  CASE
    WHEN i.rvr_end_date IS NULL THEN 'Отсутствует'
    ELSE to_char(
      i.rvr_end_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow',
      'DD.MM.YYYY HH24:MI'
    )
  END AS "Конец РВР",
  
  -- Расчет дедлайна (фиксированный +72 часа от старта РВР)
  CASE
    WHEN i.rvr_start_date IS NULL THEN 'Отсутсвтует'
    ELSE to_char(
      (i.rvr_start_date + INTERVAL '4320 minutes') AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow',
      'DD.MM.YYYY HH24:MI'
    )
  END AS "Дедлайн РВР",
  
  -- Логика SLA для РВР (Фиксированная 72 часа)
  CASE
    -- Если инцидент закрыт или нет старта
    WHEN i.rvr_start_date IS NULL THEN 'EMPTY'
    
    WHEN i.rvr_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN CASE
      WHEN i.rvr_end_date > (i.rvr_start_date + INTERVAL '4320 minutes') THEN 'CRITICAL' -- Просрочен
      ELSE 'CLOSED' -- Закрыто вовремя
    END
    
    -- Если инцидент открыт
    ELSE CASE
      -- Проверка на просрочку (текущее время > начало + 72ч)
      WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((i.rvr_start_date + INTERVAL '4320 minutes') - NOW())) < 0 
      THEN 'ERROR' 
      
      -- Менее часа до конца (осталось <= 1 час)
      WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((i.rvr_start_date + INTERVAL '4320 minutes') - NOW())) <= 3600 
      THEN 'WARNING' 
      
      -- Все хорошо -> В работе
      ELSE 'NORMAL'
    END
  END AS "Статус SLA",
  
  COALESCE(p.address, 'Без адреса') AS "Адрес",
  p.pole_latitude AS latitude,
  p.pole_longtitude AS longitude,
  i.id AS incident_id,
  p.site_id AS pole_site_id
FROM
  incidents_incident AS i
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
      DISTINCT ON (sh.incident_id) sh.incident_id,
      s.name
    FROM
      incidents_incidentstatushistory sh
      JOIN incidents_incidentstatus s ON sh.status_id = s.id
    ORDER BY
      sh.incident_id,
      sh.insert_date DESC,
      sh.id DESC
  ) AS last_status ON i.id = last_status.incident_id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidenttype AS it ON i.incident_type_id = it.id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentsubtype AS ist ON i.incident_subtype_id = ist.id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentcategoryrelation AS icr ON i.id = icr.incident_id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentcategory AS ic ON icr.category_id = ic.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_pole AS p ON i.pole_id = p.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_region AS r ON p.region_id = r.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_macroregion AS m ON r.macroregion_id = m.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestation AS b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator AS bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator AS op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id
WHERE
  ic.name = 'РВР'
  AND ic.id IN ($categories)
  AND i.is_incident_finish = False
  AND p.pole_latitude IS NOT NULL
  AND p.pole_longtitude IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(i.incident_date)
  AND (
    $macroregion = 0
    OR m.id IN ($macroregion)
  )
  AND (
    $avr_contractor = 0
    OR p.avr_contractor_id IN ($avr_contractor)
  )
  AND (
    '${region_manager}' = '0'
    OR r.responsible_manager = '${region_manager}'
  )
  AND (
    '${operator_group}' = '0'
    OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}'
  )
  AND (
      ( '${min_incident_ttl}' = '0' OR 
        (CASE WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) END) >= ${min_incident_ttl} )
  )
  AND (
      ( '${max_incident_ttl}' = '0' OR 
        (CASE WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) END) <= ${max_incident_ttl} )
  )
  AND (
      (-1 IN ($incident_type) AND (i.incident_type_id IS NULL OR i.incident_type_id IN ($incident_type)))
      OR 0 IN ($incident_type)
      OR i.incident_type_id IN ($incident_type)
  )
  AND (
      (-1 IN ($incident_subtype) AND (i.incident_subtype_id IS NULL OR i.incident_subtype_id IN ($incident_subtype)))
      OR 0 IN ($incident_subtype)
      OR i.incident_subtype_id IN ($incident_subtype)
  )
GROUP BY
  i.id,
  i.code,
  last_status.name,
  i.incident_date,
  p.pole,
  b.bs_name,
  it.name,
  ist.name,
  p.address,
  p.pole_latitude,
  p.pole_longtitude,
  p.site_id,
  i.rvr_start_date,
  i.rvr_end_date

SELECT
  COALESCE(i.code, 'ID: ' || i.id) || ' (' || COALESCE(last_status.name, 'Без статуса') || ')' AS "Инцидент",
  to_char(
    i.incident_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow',
    'DD.MM.YYYY HH24:MI'
  ) AS "Зарегестрирован",
  p.pole AS "Опора",
  COALESCE(b.bs_name, 'Отсутствует') AS "Базовая станция",
  COALESCE(it.name, 'Отсутствует') AS "Тип инцидента",
  COALESCE(ist.name, 'Отсутствует') AS "Подтип инцидента",
  
  -- Расчет времени начала ДГУ (для информации)
  CASE
    WHEN i.dgu_start_date IS NULL THEN 'Отсутствует'
    ELSE to_char(
      i.dgu_start_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow',
      'DD.MM.YYYY HH24:MI'
    )
  END AS "Начало ДГУ",
  
  -- Расчет времени окончания ДГУ (если есть)
  CASE
    WHEN i.dgu_end_date IS NULL THEN 'Отсутствует'
    ELSE to_char(
      i.dgu_end_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow',
      'DD.MM.YYYY HH24:MI'
    )
  END AS "Конец ДГУ",
  
  -- Логика SLA для ДГУ (15 дней / 12 часов)
  CASE
    -- Если инцидент закрыт или нет старта
    WHEN i.dgu_start_date IS NULL THEN 'EMPTY'
    
    WHEN i.dgu_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN CASE
      -- Если закрыто, но прошло больше 15 дней с начала
      WHEN i.dgu_end_date > (i.dgu_start_date + INTERVAL '15 days') THEN 'CRITICAL_1'
      ELSE 'CLOSED_1'
    END
    
    -- Если инцидент открыт
    ELSE CASE
      -- 1. Прошло больше 15 дней (15 * 24 * 3600 = 1296000 секунд)
      WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.dgu_start_date)) > 1296000 THEN 'ERROR_1' 
      
      -- 2. Прошло меньше 12 часов с момента старта (12 * 3600 = 43200 секунд)
      WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.dgu_start_date)) <= 43200 THEN 'NORMAL_1' 
      
      -- 3. Прошло больше 12 часов, но меньше 15 дней
      ELSE 'WARNING_1'
    END
  END AS "Статус SLA",
  
  COALESCE(p.address, 'Без адреса') AS "Адрес",
  p.pole_latitude AS latitude,
  p.pole_longtitude AS longitude,
  i.id AS incident_id,
  p.site_id AS pole_site_id
FROM
  incidents_incident AS i
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
      DISTINCT ON (sh.incident_id) sh.incident_id,
      s.name
    FROM
      incidents_incidentstatushistory sh
      JOIN incidents_incidentstatus s ON sh.status_id = s.id
    ORDER BY
      sh.incident_id,
      sh.insert_date DESC,
      sh.id DESC
  ) AS last_status ON i.id = last_status.incident_id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidenttype AS it ON i.incident_type_id = it.id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentsubtype AS ist ON i.incident_subtype_id = ist.id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentcategoryrelation AS icr ON i.id = icr.incident_id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentcategory AS ic ON icr.category_id = ic.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_pole AS p ON i.pole_id = p.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_region AS r ON p.region_id = r.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_macroregion AS m ON r.macroregion_id = m.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestation AS b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator AS bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator AS op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id
WHERE
  ic.name = 'ДГУ'
  AND ic.id IN ($categories)
  AND i.is_incident_finish = False
  AND p.pole_latitude IS NOT NULL
  AND p.pole_longtitude IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(i.incident_date)
  AND (
    $macroregion = 0
    OR m.id IN ($macroregion)
  )
  AND (
    $avr_contractor = 0
    OR p.avr_contractor_id IN ($avr_contractor)
  )
  AND (
    '${region_manager}' = '0'
    OR r.responsible_manager = '${region_manager}'
  )
  AND (
    '${operator_group}' = '0'
    OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}'
  )
  AND (
      ( '${min_incident_ttl}' = '0' OR 
        (CASE WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) END) >= ${min_incident_ttl} )
  )
  AND (
      ( '${max_incident_ttl}' = '0' OR 
        (CASE WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) END) <= ${max_incident_ttl} )
  )
  AND (
      (-1 IN ($incident_type) AND (i.incident_type_id IS NULL OR i.incident_type_id IN ($incident_type)))
      OR 0 IN ($incident_type)
      OR i.incident_type_id IN ($incident_type)
  )
  AND (
      (-1 IN ($incident_subtype) AND (i.incident_subtype_id IS NULL OR i.incident_subtype_id IN ($incident_subtype)))
      OR 0 IN ($incident_subtype)
      OR i.incident_subtype_id IN ($incident_subtype)
  )
GROUP BY
  i.id,
  i.code,
  last_status.name,
  i.incident_date,
  p.pole,
  b.bs_name,
  it.name,
  ist.name,
  p.address,
  p.pole_latitude,
  p.pole_longtitude,
  p.site_id,
  i.dgu_start_date,
  i.dgu_end_date

SELECT
  COALESCE(i.code, 'ID: ' || i.id) || ' (' || COALESCE(last_status.name, 'Без статуса') || ')' AS "Инцидент",
  to_char(
    i.incident_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow',
    'DD.MM.YYYY HH24:MI'
  ) AS "Зарегестрирован",
  p.pole AS "Опора",
  COALESCE(b.bs_name, 'Отсутствует') AS "Базовая станция",
  COALESCE(it.name, 'Отсутствует') AS "Тип инцидента",
  COALESCE(ist.name, 'Отсутствует') AS "Подтип инцидента",
  
  -- Расчет времени начала ЭКС (для информации)
  CASE
    WHEN i.eks_start_date IS NULL THEN 'Отсутствует'
    ELSE to_char(
      i.eks_start_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow',
      'DD.MM.YYYY HH24:MI'
    )
  END AS "Начало ЭКС",
  
  -- Расчет времени окончания ЭКС (если есть)
  CASE
    WHEN i.eks_end_date IS NULL THEN 'Отсутствует'
    ELSE to_char(
      i.eks_end_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow',
      'DD.MM.YYYY HH24:MI'
    )
  END AS "Конец ЭКС",
  
  -- Логика SLA для ЭКС (15 дней / 12 часов)
  CASE
    -- Если инцидент закрыт или нет старта
    WHEN i.eks_start_date IS NULL THEN 'EMPTY'
    
    WHEN i.eks_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN CASE
      -- Если закрыто, но прошло больше 15 дней с начала
      WHEN i.eks_end_date > (i.eks_start_date + INTERVAL '15 days') THEN 'CRITICAL_1'
      ELSE 'CLOSED_1'
    END
    
    -- Если инцидент открыт
    ELSE CASE
      -- 1. Прошло больше 15 дней (15 * 24 * 3600 = 1296000 секунд)
      WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.eks_start_date)) > 1296000 THEN 'ERROR_1' 
      
      -- 2. Прошло меньше 12 часов с момента старта (12 * 3600 = 43200 секунд)
      WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.eks_start_date)) <= 43200 THEN 'NORMAL_1' 
      
      -- 3. Прошло больше 12 часов, но меньше 15 дней
      ELSE 'WARNING_1'
    END
  END AS "Статус SLA",
  
  COALESCE(p.address, 'Без адреса') AS "Адрес",
  p.pole_latitude AS latitude,
  p.pole_longtitude AS longitude,
  i.id AS incident_id,
  p.site_id AS pole_site_id
FROM
  incidents_incident AS i
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
      DISTINCT ON (sh.incident_id) sh.incident_id,
      s.name
    FROM
      incidents_incidentstatushistory sh
      JOIN incidents_incidentstatus s ON sh.status_id = s.id
    ORDER BY
      sh.incident_id,
      sh.insert_date DESC,
      sh.id DESC
  ) AS last_status ON i.id = last_status.incident_id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidenttype AS it ON i.incident_type_id = it.id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentsubtype AS ist ON i.incident_subtype_id = ist.id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentcategoryrelation AS icr ON i.id = icr.incident_id
  LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentcategory AS ic ON icr.category_id = ic.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_pole AS p ON i.pole_id = p.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_region AS r ON p.region_id = r.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_macroregion AS m ON r.macroregion_id = m.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestation AS b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator AS bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator AS op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id
WHERE
  ic.name = 'ЭКС'
  AND ic.id IN ($categories)
  AND i.is_incident_finish = False
  AND p.pole_latitude IS NOT NULL
  AND p.pole_longtitude IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(i.incident_date)
  AND (
    $macroregion = 0
    OR m.id IN ($macroregion)
  )
  AND (
    $avr_contractor = 0
    OR p.avr_contractor_id IN ($avr_contractor)
  )
  AND (
    '${region_manager}' = '0'
    OR r.responsible_manager = '${region_manager}'
  )
  AND (
    '${operator_group}' = '0'
    OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}'
  )
  AND (
      ( '${min_incident_ttl}' = '0' OR 
        (CASE WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) END) >= ${min_incident_ttl} )
  )
  AND (
      ( '${max_incident_ttl}' = '0' OR 
        (CASE WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) END) <= ${max_incident_ttl} )
  )
  AND (
      (-1 IN ($incident_type) AND (i.incident_type_id IS NULL OR i.incident_type_id IN ($incident_type)))
      OR 0 IN ($incident_type)
      OR i.incident_type_id IN ($incident_type)
  )
  AND (
      (-1 IN ($incident_subtype) AND (i.incident_subtype_id IS NULL OR i.incident_subtype_id IN ($incident_subtype)))
      OR 0 IN ($incident_subtype)
      OR i.incident_subtype_id IN ($incident_subtype)
  )
GROUP BY
  i.id,
  i.code,
  last_status.name,
  i.incident_date,
  p.pole,
  b.bs_name,
  it.name,
  ist.name,
  p.address,
  p.pole_latitude,
  p.pole_longtitude,
  p.site_id,
  i.eks_start_date,
  i.eks_end_date

SELECT
  p.pole AS "Опора",
  COALESCE(b.bs_name, 'Отсутствует') AS "Базовая станция",
  STRING_AGG(DISTINCT COALESCE(i.code, 'ID: ' || i.id), ', ') AS "Инциденты",
  COUNT(DISTINCT i.id) AS "Повторы"
FROM incidents_incident AS i
JOIN ts_pole AS p ON i.pole_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN ts_basestation AS b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentcategoryrelation AS icr ON i.id = icr.incident_id
LEFT JOIN incidents_incidentcategory AS ic ON icr.category_id = ic.id
LEFT JOIN ts_region AS r ON p.region_id = r.id
LEFT JOIN ts_macroregion AS m ON r.macroregion_id = m.id
LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator AS bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator AS op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id
WHERE 
  ic.id IN ($categories)
  -- Только открытые инциденты
  AND i.is_incident_finish = False 
  
  -- Координаты (обязательно для карты)
  AND p.pole IS NOT NULL
  
  AND $__timeFilter(i.incident_date)
  AND ($macroregion = 0 OR m.id IN ($macroregion))
  AND ($avr_contractor = 0 OR p.avr_contractor_id IN ($avr_contractor))
  AND ('${region_manager}' = '0' OR r.responsible_manager = '${region_manager}')
  AND ('${operator_group}' = '0' OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}')
  AND (
      ( '${min_incident_ttl}' = '0' OR 
        (CASE WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) END) >= ${min_incident_ttl} )
  )
  AND (
      ( '${max_incident_ttl}' = '0' OR 
        (CASE WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) END) <= ${max_incident_ttl} )
  )
  AND (
      (-1 IN ($incident_type) AND (incident_type_id IS NULL OR incident_type_id IN ($incident_type)))
      OR 0 IN ($incident_type)
      OR incident_type_id IN ($incident_type)
  )
  AND (
      (-1 IN ($incident_subtype) AND (incident_subtype_id IS NULL OR incident_subtype_id IN ($incident_subtype)))
      OR 0 IN ($incident_subtype)
      OR incident_subtype_id IN ($incident_subtype)
  )

GROUP BY 
  p.pole, 
  b.bs_name

HAVING 
  COUNT(DISTINCT i.id) >= 2 

ORDER BY 
  p.pole,
  b.bs_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT i.id) DESC,
  MAX(i.incident_date) DESC;

spec.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
operator_group
FROM ts_basestationoperator
WHERE operator_group != ''
ORDER BY operator_group
spec.label: Оператор
spec.name: operator_group

spec.definition:
SELECT
	contractor_name AS "Contractor Name",
	id AS "Contractor ID"
FROM ts_avrcontractor
WHERE contractor_name != 'undefined'
ORDER BY contractor_name, id;

spec.label: TTL (min), мин
spec.name: min_incident_ttl

spec.label: TTL (max), мин
spec.name: max_incident_ttl
